text_original: This app has too much inappropriate characters
text_zh: 这个应用有太多不当角色。
reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience. To comply with Google Play policies, we have strict content moderation and filters. If you encounter specific characters that violate these rules, please report them or email us at support@fantachat.ai with details. We are working hard to ensure a safe environment for everyone.
reply_zh: 你好，对于这次不愉快的使用体验，我深表歉意。为了遵守 Google Play 的政策，我们设有严格的内容审核和过滤机制。如果您遇到违反这些规则的特定角色，请举报或发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 告知详情。我们正努力为每个人确保一个安全的环境。
